message: Node started: Determine if a Hermitian matrix eigenvalue spectrum can match the super-rigidity of the Riemann zeta zeros, specifically regarding the Delta_3 statistic. Compare the Riemann zeta zeros' value (Delta_3_sat = 0.155) against the standard value for Hermitian matrices (Delta_3_sat = 0.24). Your final answer must state whether they can match (Yes/No) and explicitly identify the quantitative gap between 0.155 and 0.24. Provide the result in the format: FINAL_ANSWER: <answer> JUSTIFICATION: <brief justification>
